ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少类型化数组（Uint8Array）支持，这是 `buffer` v5.x 所必需的。如果您需要支持旧版浏览器，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: ACTION NEEDED: require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() is not supported in your version of Node
ast.target: 需要操作：您的Node版本不支持 require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings()

ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite 警告：对字符串使用 decode() 已弃用。请参考 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 正在移除已解析对象：0 0 R

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Removing XFA form data as pdf-lib does not support reading or writing XFA
ast.target: 正在移除XFA表单数据，因为pdf-lib不支持读取或写入XFA

ast.name: warn
ast.source: pdftion skipped annotation state without a PDF fingerprint.
ast.target: pdftion 跳过了没有PDF指纹的注释状态。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: pdftion skipped annotation state for a replaced PDF.
ast.target: pdftion 跳过了已替换PDF的注释状态。
